title: Heros Tools Expanded
description: Tools to small, No Worries. Tools Expanded makes all your tools Bigger and more Unique in your hand
body:
Tools Expanded is a Resource Pack created by me to make all the Weapons and Tools Bigger and More Unique.

This is a Resource Pack that WORKS in 1.21.11. It SHOULD work in future releases as long a MOJANG does not Rearrange the Textrure Files.

DO NOT be alarmed by the fact the icon is Red in the resourse Pack screen, IT WILL still work.
